rule.name: LM_CalculateAnnualEntitlement
rule.description: Determines an employee's annual leave entitlement based on their employment start date and leave type configuration.
rule.definition:
a!localVariables( local!startDate: a!defaultValue(ri!employeeStartDate, today()), local!defaultAllowance: a!defaultValue(ri!leaveTypeDefaultAllowance, 0),
local!currentYear: year(today()), local!currentYearStart: date(local!currentYear, 1, 1), local!startYear: year(local!startDate),
local!annualEntitlement: if( local!startYear = local!currentYear, local!monthsRemaining: 12 - (month(local!startDate) - 1), local!proRatedEntitlement: (local!defaultAllowance / 12) * local!monthsRemaining, round(local!proRatedEntitlement, 0), local!defaultAllowance ),
local!annualEntitlement )

namedTypedValue.name: employeeStartDate
namedTypedValue.description: Date when employee joined the organization

namedTypedValue.name: leaveTypeDefaultAllowance
namedTypedValue.description: Configured annual days for the leave type
